violations.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
violations.help: Elements must only use supported ARIA attributes

violations.description: Ensure every ARIA button, link and menuitem has an accessible name
violations.help: ARIA commands must have an accessible name

violations.description: Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
violations.help: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements

violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

violations.description: Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements have an accessible name
violations.help: Frames must have an accessible name

violations.description: Ensure image alternative is not repeated as text
violations.help: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text

violations.description: Ensure the document has at most one banner landmark
violations.help: Document should not have more than one banner landmark

violations.description: Ensure the document has a main landmark
violations.help: Document should have one main landmark
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

violations.description: Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
violations.help: Interactive controls must not be nested

violations.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
violations.help: Page should contain a level-one heading

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
